title: senecio blanchei
intro: Senecio blanchei, also known as Blanche's ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to New Zealand. It is primarily used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues like bronchitis and asthma, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. Traditionally, Senecio blanchei has been used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and salves, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential toxicity and side effects.
